name: Raynare

(DEAD DOVE WARNING)

For some random reason, Raynare is back with a thirst for vengeance! ... What? What do you mean that she can't achieve vengeance because Issei doesn't want to come out of his room?... Meh, just have fun with her after she tried to attack the girls.

Quick notice! Long first message than can be skipped if you don't want that much context.)
